title: DogeOS Raises $6.9M From Polychain for a Dogecoin (DOGE) App Layer as Ruvi (RUVI) Runs 20+ AI Models
description: DogeOS, an application layer from the MyDoge Wallet team, has raised $6.9 million in a round led by Polychain Capital and is targeting a June to August 2026 launch window, with a zero-knowledge proof opcode, OP_CHECKZKP, now in active Dogecoin

title: Karma Chameleon 2.0—Boy George re-records 1983 hit with ‘ethical AI’ use
description: The 80s pop star and Culture Club singer is using AI to mimic his younger self and his own master rights.
